title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in and is taken to the authenticated dashboard as a stable entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Auth-gated route redirects to login and returns after authentication
description: Verifies visiting an authenticated page while logged out redirects to login and, after signing in, returns the user to the originally requested page.

steps.description: Navigate to /app/alunos
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the students page

title: Access payments requires login and returns to requested page
description: Verifies that a logged-out user attempting to access payments is redirected to login and, after successful login, lands on the payments page.

steps.description: Navigate to /app/pagamentos
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the payments page

title: Create a new student with full details and plan dates
description: Verifies staff can create a student with CPF, contact, address, and plan dates and see the student appear in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the students area
Start creating a new student
Fill a unique full name into the student name field
Fill a valid CPF in the required format into the CPF field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill valid address details into the address fields
Select a valid plan start date
Select a valid plan due date after the start date
Save the student
Verify the new student appears in the student list

title: Generate PIX QR code and copy payload for an outstanding invoice
description: Verifies that staff can select an outstanding invoice and generate a PIX QR code and a copyable payload string for payment.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open payments
Select an outstanding invoice from the list
Generate PIX payment details for the selected invoice
Verify a PIX QR code is displayed and a copyable payment payload string is shown

title: Register a new user then see onboarding after first login
description: Verifies a new user can register, log in, and is shown an onboarding plan prompt after first login.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new unique name into the name field
Fill a new unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Navigate to /login
Fill the newly registered email into the email field
Fill the same password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an onboarding prompt to choose a plan is displayed

title: Create and assign a workout with exercises and parameters
description: Verifies an instructor can select a student, create a workout with exercises and set details, save it, and see it listed as assigned for that student.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the students area
Start creating a new student
Fill a unique full name into the student name field
Fill a valid CPF in the required format into the CPF field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill valid address details into the address fields
Select a valid plan start date
Select a valid plan due date after the start date
Save the student
Click the navigation link to the workouts area
Select the newly created student from the student list
Start creating a new workout for the selected student
Add an exercise from the exercise library
Set a valid number of sets for the added exercise
Set a valid number of reps for the added exercise
Set valid cadence and rest details for the added exercise
Save the workout
Verify the workout is shown as assigned for the selected student

title: Session persists across page reload on authenticated area
description: Verifies an authenticated session remains active after a page reload so the user stays in the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/painel
Reload the page
Verify the user remains on an authenticated app page without being sent to login

title: View invoices list with payment statuses
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open payments and see a list of invoices with their current statuses displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open payments
Verify a list of invoices is displayed with payment status information

title: Edit an existing student and persist updates
description: Verifies a user can create a student, edit contact/address details, save, and see the updated details persist when reopening the student.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the students area
Start creating a new student
Fill a unique full name into the student name field
Fill a valid CPF in the required format into the CPF field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill valid address details into the address fields
Select a valid plan start date
Select a valid plan due date after the start date
Save the student
Open the newly created student from the list
Update the phone field to a different valid number
Update one address field to a new valid value
Save the changes
Reopen the same student from the list
Verify the updated student details are displayed

title: Cancel invoice selection returns to invoice list without PIX details
description: Verifies that staff can back out of a selected invoice and return to the invoice list without PIX details remaining visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open payments
Select an invoice from the list
Return to the invoice list view
Verify only the invoice list is displayed and no PIX QR or payload is shown

title: Invoice list handles empty state
description: Verifies that when there are no invoices to display, the payments page shows an empty state instead of a broken or blank UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open payments
Verify an empty state message is visible for invoices

title: Workout requires at least one exercise before saving
description: Verifies the workout form blocks saving a workout when no exercises are added and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the students area
Start creating a new student
Fill a unique full name into the student name field
Fill a valid CPF in the required format into the CPF field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill valid address details into the address fields
Select a valid plan start date
Select a valid plan due date after the start date
Save the student
Click the navigation link to the workouts area
Select the newly created student from the student list
Start creating a new workout for the selected student
Attempt to save the workout without adding any exercises
Verify a validation error is displayed requiring at least one exercise

title: Student CPF length validation prevents save
description: Verifies the student form blocks saving when CPF does not meet the required length and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the students area
Start creating a new student
Fill a name into the student name field
Fill an invalid-length CPF into the CPF field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill minimal valid address details into the address fields
Select a valid plan start date
Select a valid plan due date after the start date
Attempt to save the student
Verify a CPF validation error is displayed and the student is not saved

title: Prevent PIX generation when invoice amount is invalid or missing
description: Verifies that attempting to generate PIX for an invoice with missing or invalid amount is blocked with a validation error and no QR/payload is produced.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open payments
Select an invoice that has no amount or an invalid amount
Attempt to generate PIX payment details
Verify a validation error is visible preventing PIX generation

title: Registration blocks invalid email or mismatched passwords
description: Verifies registration validation prevents creating an account when email format is invalid or passwords do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a name into the name field
Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill a different password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify validation errors are displayed for the invalid inputs
